sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 힐튼, 2025년 4분기 및 연간 실적 발표, 조정 EBITDA 37억 2,500만 달러 달성 및 레코드 파이프라인 확보

keyPoints.text: 4분기 희석 EPS 1.27달러, 특별항목 조정 희석 EPS 2.08달러, 연간 기준으로는 각각 6.12달러와 8.11달러를 달성했습니다.
4분기 조정 EBITDA는 14억 6,100만 달러, 연간 조정 EBITDA는 37억 2,500만 달러를 기록했습니다.
연간 순 유닛 성장률 6.7%를 달성했으며, 4분기에만 4% 증가한 파이프라인이 사상 최대 규모를 기록했습니다.

riskChanges.text: 4분기 시스템 전체 비교 RevPAR은 전년 동기 대비 0.5% 성장에 그쳤으며 연간 기준도 0.4% 성장으로 제한적이었습니다.

businessChanges.text: 4분기 말 기준 개발 파이프라인이 전년 동기 대비 4% 증가하며 사상 최대 규모를 달성했습니다.
4분기 자본환원은 7억 9,200만 달러이며 연간 자본환원은 33억 달러에 달했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2026년 연간 RevPAR 성장률 가이던스는 통화중립 기준 1.0% 이상 2.0% 이하로 제시됐습니다.
2026년 연간 순이익 가이던스는 19억 8,200만 달러~20억 1,100만 달러, 조정 EBITDA는 40억 달러~40억 4,000만 달러입니다.

watchItems.text: 2025년 RevPAR 성장이 제한적이었으나 경영진은 거시 성장 및 글로벌 이벤트 수요가 RevPAR 회복을 견인할 것으로 전망했습니다.
순 유닛 성장률 6.0% 이상 7.0% 이하의 중기 목표와 함께 신규 브랜드·파트너십 기여도가 핵심 관찰 포인트입니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q42025earningsrelease.htm PRESS RELEASE Document Investor Contact 7930 Jones Branch Drive Charlie Ruehr McLean, VA 22102 +1 703 883 1000 ir.hilton.com Media Contact Kent Landers +1 703 883 3246 Hilton Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results MCLEAN, VA (February 11, 2026) - Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. ("Hilton," "the Company," "we," "us" or "our") (NYSE: HLT) today reported its fourth quarter and full year 2025 results. Highlights include: • Diluted EPS was $1.27 for the fourth quarter and $6.12 for the full year • Diluted EPS, adjusted for special items, was $2.08 for the fourth quarter and $8.11 for the  Normalized numeric aliases: $298 million = 2억 9,800만 달러; $1,461 million = 14억 6,100만 달러; $946 million = 9억 4,600만 달러; $3,725 million = 37억 2,500만 달러; $1.27 = 1.27달러; $6.12 = 6.12달러; $2.08 = 2.08달러; $8.11 = 8.11달러; $1,461 = 1,461달러; 0.5 percent = 0.5%; $946 = 946달러; $3,725 = 3,725달러; 1,461 million = 14억 6,100만 달러; 3,725 million = 37억 2,500만 달러; 0.4 percent = 0.4%.

currency neutral basis, for the fourth quarter and full year, respectively, compared to the same periods in 2024 • Approved 37,400 new rooms for development during the fourth quarter, bringing our development pipeline to a record 520,500 rooms as of December 31, 2025, representing growth of 4 percent from December 31, 2024 • Added 26,000 rooms to our system in the fourth quarter, resulting in 97,000 room openings for the full year, contributing to net unit growth of 6.7 percent from December 31, 2024 • Issued $1.0 billion aggregate principal amount of 5.500% Senior Notes due 2034 in December 2025 • Announced the launch of a new brand, Apartment Collection by Hilton, in January 2026 • Expanded Hilton Honors Adventures in December 2025, welcoming Explora Journeys as the second partner, following AutoCamp in 2024, and expanding into luxury ocean travel • Repurchased  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.0 billion = 10억 달러; 2.8 million = 280만 달러; $1.0 = 1.0달러; 4 percent = 4%; 6.7 percent = 6.7%.

common stock during the fourth quarter, bringing total capital return, including dividends, to $792 million for the quarter and $3.3 billion for the full year • Full year 2026 system-wide RevPAR is projected to increase between 1.0 percent and 2.0 percent on a comparable and currency neutral basis compared to 2025; full year net income is projected to be between $1,982 million and $2,011 million; full year Adjusted EBITDA is projected to be between $4,000 million and $4,040 million • Full year 2026 capital return is projected to be approximately $3.5 billion • Net unit growth for  Normalized numeric aliases: $792 million = 7억 9,200만 달러; $3.3 billion = 33억 달러; $1,982 million = 19억 8,200만 달러; $2,011 million = 20억 1,100만 달러; $4,000 million = 40억 달러; $4,040 million = 40억 4,000만 달러; $3.5 billion = 35억 달러; $792 = 792달러; $1,982 = 1,982달러; 1,982 million = 19억 8,200만 달러; 2.0 percent = 2.0%; 2,011 million = 20억 1,100만 달러; 4,000 million = 40억 달러; 4,040 million = 40억 4,000만 달러; 1.0 percent = 1.0%.

about the tailwinds building, including improving demand patterns, driven by broader macroeconomic growth and major global and domestic events, which, when paired with limited supply growth, should result in stronger RevPAR performance. The quality of our development pipeline, the introduction of our exciting new brands and partnerships, as well as the continued growth in the presence of our existing brands globally, give us confidence in delivering net unit growth between 6.0 percent and 7.0 percent in 2026 and beyond." For the three months ended December 31, 2025, system-wide comparable RevPAR increased 0.5 percent compared to the same period in 2024 due to an increase in ADR, partially offset by modest occupancy declines. Management and franchise fee revenues increased 7.4 percent compared to the same period in 2024. For the year ended December 31, 2025, system-wide  Normalized numeric aliases: 6.0 percent = 6.0%; 7.0 percent = 7.0%; 0.5 percent = 0.5%; 7.4 percent = 7.4%.
